title: Impressions of JavaZone 2017
summary: A few impressions of my stay at JavaZone 2017 to music from WillRock
content:
A few impressions of my stay at JavaZone 2017 to music from WillRock

JavaZone 2017 was the first time I had my camera with me and I decided to put the impressions into a short video.

Watch the video.
